context.role: Ground obstacle that player must jump over
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=screen_width+50px, y=0px (ground level), scrolls left at Current_Speed
context.usage_scenario: Basic ground obstacle appearing from game start, most common obstacle type (40% spawn rate)

visual_specification.shape: Single vertical cactus with spikes, desert plant silhouette
visual_specification.details: Single cactus with visible spikes, vertical orientation, hitbox 31x67px (3px margin from sprite)

relationships.shared_with: Same visual style as cactus_medium and cactus_large
relationships.differences_from: cactus_medium is 68x70px (2 cacti), cactus_large is 102x100px (3 cacti with varied heights)

explicit_negations: No texture details beyond pixel art style
No shadow or ground connection visual
